headline: Celanese Teams Up With Siegwerk to Advance Printing Ink Solutions
summary: CE partners with Siegwerk to expand bio-based ethyl acetate use in printing inks, advancing sustainable, low-carbon packaging solutions.

raw.headline: Celanese Teams Up With Siegwerk to Advance Printing Ink Solutions
raw.summary: CE partners with Siegwerk to expand bio-based ethyl acetate use in printing inks, advancing sustainable, low-carbon packaging solutions.

headline: FSM Advances Diamba Sud Project With Environmental Approval
summary: Fortuna Mining secures environmental approval for Senegal's Diamba Sud Gold Mine, clearing a key hurdle as the project advances toward feasibility completion.

raw.headline: FSM Advances Diamba Sud Project With Environmental Approval
raw.summary: Fortuna Mining secures environmental approval for Senegal's Diamba Sud Gold Mine, clearing a key hurdle as the project advances toward feasibility completion.
